parsedBody.response:
Based on data from a past query (fetched March 1, 2026), the top result in the Sports category on Kalshi is a cross-category parlay market. Below is the cross-reference with related markets on Polymarket.

| Attribute | Kalshi Top Result | Polymarket Equivalent (EPL) | Polymarket Equivalent (Carabao) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Title** | yes Tottenham, yes Arsenal wins by over 1.5 goals, yes Over 2.5 goals scored, yes Atalanta | English Premier League Winner | Carabao Cup Winner |
| **Ticker/Slug** | KXMVECROSSCATEGORY... | english-premier-league-winner | carabao-cup-winner |
| **Yes Price** | 0¢ | 0 (Scale 0-1) | 0 (Scale 0-1) |
| **Volume** | $0 (24h) | $14,143,548.71 (Total) | $0 (Total) |
| **Liquidity** | N/A | $2,124,798.26 | $0 |

**Comparison Notes:**
*   **Market Type:** The Kalshi result is a complex multi-leg parlay, whereas Polymarket offers individual outright winner markets for the specific leagues/cups mentioned.
*   **Pricing:** Both platforms currently show a "0" price for the specific outcomes fetched (Brentford winning the EPL or "Team C" winning the Carabao Cup). 
*   **Volume:** The Polymarket English Premier League Winner market shows significantly higher activity with over $14 million in volume compared to the Kalshi parlay market.

kalshiTopMarket.title: yes Tottenham,yes Arsenal wins by over 1.5 goals,yes Over 2.5 goals scored,yes Over 2.5 goals scored,yes Atalanta

polymarketMatches.title: Carabao Cup Winner
polymarketMatches.question: Will Team C win the 2025–26 Carabao Cup?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket to predict which club will win the 2025–26 Carabao Cup.

If the listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 Carabao Cup, this market will resolve to "Yes." Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the 2025–26 Carabao Cup is canceled or not completed by June 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other."

The primary resolution source for this market will be official results published by the Carabao Cup / EFL Cup (https://www.efl.com/competitions/carabao-cup/). A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "Carabao Cup Winner " occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "Carabao Cup Winner " does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: English Premier League Winner
polymarketMatches.question: Will Brentford win the 2025–26 English Premier League?
polymarketMatches.rules:
This is a polymarket on whether the listed club will win the 2025–26 English Premier League.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to win the league (e.g. they are mathematically eliminated), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 English Premier League
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "English Premier League Winner " does NOT occur

data.comparisonNote:
⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM COMPARISON GUIDE:
1. Polymarket prices are decimals (0.25 = 25%), Kalshi prices are cents (25 = 25%)
2. READ 'yesOutcomeMeans' for each market - they may be INVERTED!
3. Example: If Polymarket YES means "Court rules AGAINST" and Kalshi YES means "Court rules IN FAVOR", then Polymarket NO ≈ Kalshi YES
4. Only compare prices AFTER confirming outcomes align!
